summary: Comprehensive testing of BG/EN bilingual localization feature for KOSTIN cosmetics e-commerce. All language toggle functionality working correctly. UI text translates properly between English and Bulgarian. Product names and brand names remain unchanged as required.

issues: Product image not loading for some products (shows alt text). This is expected - wholesale supplier images may be unavailable.

critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext.jsx correctly implements language detection from browser and localStorage persistence
Translation files (en.js, bg.js) are comprehensive with 290+ translation keys each
Language toggle button has proper data-testid='language-toggle' for testing
Product names and brand names correctly remain untranslated
Product description_bg field is properly used when language is Bulgarian
All pages (Home, Products, ProductDetail, Cart, Auth, FAQ, About, Shipping) properly use t() function for translations
seed_data_creation: 185 products with description_bg field populated via GPT-4.1-mini translation
context_for_next_testing_agent: BG/EN localization fully implemented and tested. Language toggle in header works correctly. localStorage key 'kostin_lang' persists preference. All UI text translates except product names/brands (as required). Product descriptions show Bulgarian text when description_bg field exists.

frontend.test: Language toggle visible in header with globe icon + BG/EN label
Clicking toggle switches UI text from EN to BG
Clicking toggle switches UI text from BG to EN
Language preference persists in localStorage (key: kostin_lang)
